---
description: andy implement — implement approved tasks with minimal change and TDD
argument-hint: "<change-name | tasks path>"
---

You are running the andy `implement` workflow.

Input: `$ARGUMENTS`

Steps:

1. Resolve the andy harness root. Use the first directory that contains both `AGENTS.md` and `core/workflows/`, in this order: `$ANDY_HARNESS_ROOT` (if set), `${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/active-harness`, `${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/harnesses/andy`, `./.andy/harness`. If none exists, tell the user to run the andy installer.
2. Read `<harness-root>/core/workflows/command-router.md` and `<harness-root>/core/workflows/implement.md`, then follow them.
3. Treat the current working directory as the target development repository. Read `./openspec/changes/<change-name>/tasks.md` and implement in that repository.
4. Only implement approved tasks. If parallelizing, assign disjoint write scopes per worker and do not revert others' work.
5. Run the relevant verification and report evidence.

If the input is empty, ask the user which change-name or tasks.md to implement.
